allow: Bash(python3 -c "import qrcode" 2>&1 || pip3 install qrcode[pil] 2>&1 | tail -3)

Bash(python3 -c "
import qrcode
from qrcode.image.styledpil import StyledPilImage
from qrcode.image.styles.moduledrawers import RoundedModuleDrawer

qr = qrcode.QRCode\(version=1, error_correction=qrcode.constants.ERROR_CORRECT_H, box_size=10, border=2\)
qr.add_data\('https://chat.whatsapp.com/K5qZ6rp391mFRiNBuQmMu4?mode=hq1tcli'\)
qr.make\(fit=True\)
img = qr.make_image\(image_factory=StyledPilImage, module_drawer=RoundedModuleDrawer\(\), fill_color='#7c3aed', back_color='#ffffff'\)
img.save\('/Users/luishenriques/WebstormProjects/web_weedning/assets/images/whatsapp-qr.jpg'\)
print\('done'\)
")
